free_text: The multichannel method  of the reaction yield
measurement was  used  in  which  the  bremsstrahlung
end-point  energy  has  been changed automatically in
each cycle of electron acceleration in betatron  with
Yield curve of the photoneutron reaction was measured
from  the  threshold  up to 28 MeV with 50-keV step.
THe  effective  cross  section   of   the   reaction
constructed   from  the  yield  cirve  by  means  of
Penfold-Leiss method has  a  complicated  structure.
The  results  of  the  experiment were compared with
calculations fulfilled in framework of shell model.
REFERENCE journal code changed  from  PAN
The Penfold - Leiss unfolding method with
the bin 200 keV was used for obtaining cross section
Sov. J. Nucl. Phys. 14,16,1972 have been digitized
at the Russia MSU SINP CDFE by V.V.Varlamov.
